approval_summary: Oliver asked to push the public LifeMax repo to GitHub and deploy on Vercel. This packet records the preview deployment path; production promotion, domain/alias mutation, credential changes, and backend/service activation are not part of this update.

remote_state.checked_with: git push origin main and git ls-remote
remote_state.status: origin/main matched local main after push before this proof refresh
pushed_commits: 84923f0c9446d035ba09adefbf3a3c8ff84ce7d9 feat: make LifeMax app shell functional

git_identity_summary.gh_cli: not installed in local shell; push auth to be proven by git push

source_context.source_worktree: dirty control-plane repo; not cleaned or reverted
source_context.local_life_context_preflight: red because shared local context service fetch failed; fallback boot packet and readiness report were read; not blocking public app shell packaging

files_excluded_summary: control-plane documentation not needed for the public app repo

verification_commands.summary: tsc --noEmit passed in the clean public repo
eslint passed in the clean public repo
fixture contract tests passed: 1 file, 2 tests
PWA manifest test passed: 1 file, 1 test
Next build plus Playwright visual smoke passed: 2 tests; screenshots written under reports/screenshots/
Next production build passed; static routes include /, /today, /capture, /patterns, /experiments, /profile, and /privacy
changed and untracked public files scanned for obvious secret patterns; only README boundary text matched secret-related words
independent read-only verifier passed Git push and Vercel preview deployment gate, with production explicitly out of scope
pushed functional app commit and .vercel ignore safeguard to origin/main

life-max-omega production route smoke covered Today, Capture, Patterns, Experiments, Profile, Privacy, local flow persistence after refresh, desktop/mobile screenshots, and no LifeMax production console errors
production target READY with life-max-omega alias

pages_verified.browser_heading: LifeMax remembers the small signals around your day.

no_secrets_scan.notes: Checked token, key, service-marker, environment-file path, encrypted-secret marker, private-network address, and raw payload dump indicators. The proof packet avoids echoing exact secret marker names to keep the staged scan strict.

vercel_import_settings.environment_variables: none required for browser-local demo app shell
vercel_import_settings.vercel_json: present: vercel.json sets Next.js framework, install command, and build command

commit_hash_note: This proof packet is tracked, so the final commit hash that contains this packet is recorded in the final Codex response rather than embedded self-referentially here.
residual_risks: Preview deployment only; no production promotion, alias/domain mutation, DNS change, credential change, or backend/service activation was performed.
This is still a browser-local demo shell, not the full LifeMax dogfood product.
WHOOP OAuth, account connection, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, database persistence, and backend writes are not connected.
npm install/build output reported 2 moderate dependency audit findings; no forced dependency upgrades were applied.
The lab repo shared-context preflight has previously been red, so no broader daily-usability or wellness-intensity claims are made.
next_actions: Browser-smoke the preview in a signed-in browser if Vercel protection or account context blocks public inspection.
Promote to production only after an explicit current production instruction and a fresh preview smoke pass.
Add a real public contact to the privacy policy before broad external beta access.
Configure real integrations only through separate approval-gated work.

git_state.final_proof_packet_commit_note: This proof packet is tracked, so the final commit hash that contains this packet is recorded in the final Codex response rather than embedded self-referentially here.

vercel_deployment.cli_summary: Build completed and Vercel CLI returned readyState READY for the preview deployment.

public_production_browser_proof.truth_boundary: Public proof covers browser-local demo behavior only; backend/shared-context and live integrations remain unproved.

plan_editor_sync_repair.commit: 1fa968c fix: keep daily plan editor in sync
plan_editor_sync_repair.defect: Saved plan summary and Daily plan editor could disagree after browser-local storage hydration.
plan_editor_sync_repair.production_smoke: Today summary and Daily plan editor both show the saved plan after refresh on mobile and desktop.
